text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the third of the Classic races—the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
For a while, it was looking like I wasn't even
gonna be able to enter...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I made it! I'm finally at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Looks like all our efforts were worth it,
huh, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, I need to get pumped up! I came here to
show them what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I will! The third of those crowns is gonna be
mine for sure, you wait and see!
